name: discoverIE Group plc
summary: discoverIE Group plc designs, manufactures, and supplies components for electronic applications worldwide. It operates in two divisions, Design & Manufacturing, and Custom Supply. The company also offers technically demanding, customized electronic, photonic, and medical products to the industrial, medical, and healthcare markets. It serves customers in renewable energy, transportation, medical, and industrial and connectivity markets. The company was formerly known as Acal plc and changed its name to discoverIE Group plc in November 2017. discoverIE Group plc was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Guildford, the United Kingdom.
